name: workspaces
description: The tenant boundary (org/team/individual): workspaces/memberships/invites + RBAC + provider WorkspaceProvider/switcher/Members + /invite accept.
notes: Convex fns (workspaces.ts, workspaceInvites.ts) declared in-place via slice.json rootPaths — not moved, to keep api.workspaces.* / internal.workspaces.* stable. requireWorkspaceRole lives in convex/_shared/auth.ts (shared authz), not the slice, so all app code uses one helper. Consumer-locked: Members UI copy + switcher shell classes are app-specific; generalize before an UP push.
